summary: Iteration 103 - Technical Debt Remediation Pass #2 complete. All 56 tests passed (45 unit + 11 API). Verified consolidation of shared normalization, fuzzy matching, and BC access adapter. All API contracts preserved.
passed_tests: POST /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/test-id?stop_after=classification returns structured result with stages array

bc_access.py provides shared token caching (50 min) and company ID resolution
entity_resolution_service correctly delegates to normalize_text and fuzzy_ratio
unified_vendor_matcher correctly delegates to normalize_company_name, fuzzy_ratio, is_freight_carrier, get_bc_adapter
bc_reference_resolver correctly delegates to get_bc_adapter for token/company management
All services preserve original method signatures as thin wrappers for backward compatibility
